page_metadata.biotools__summary: ArchPRED predicts the structure of loop regions in protein structures based on a fragment-search based method. Given a query loop of unknown structure, ArchPRED identifies which loops of know structures are likely to share conformational similarity with the query loop.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ArchPRED predicts the structure of loop regions in protein structures based on a fragment-search based method. Given a query loop of unknown structure, ArchPRED identifies which loops of know structures are likely to share conformational similarity with the query loop.
